title: The Tribunals Reforms Act, 2021
full_text: The Tribunals Reforms Act, 2021 अधिकरण सुधार अधिनियम, 2021 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 2021-33 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 2021-08-13 Act Year: 2021 Short Title: The Tribunals Reforms Act, 2021 Hindi Title: अधिकरण सुधार अधिनियम, 2021 Long Title: An Act further to amend the Cinematograph Act, 1952, the Customs Act, 1962, the Airports Authority of India Act, 1994, the Trade Marks Act, 1999 and the Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers' Rights Act, 2001 and certain other Acts. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Revenue Enforcement Date: 04-04-2021 Schedule 1. First Schedule Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2.
